title: Sweet And Crunchy Italian Date Stir-fry
description: A sweet and crunchy Italian date dish featuring wholegrain bread, perfect for a date night or as a snack with a low FODMAP diet.
instructions: Cut the wholegrain bread into thin slices and spread a little coconut oil on each slice.
Arrange the bread slices in a single layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast for about 10 minutes or until golden brown, flipping halfway through cooking time to ensure even browning.
While the bread is roasting, soak date medjool in warm water for at least 30 minutes. Soaking helps soften them and prevents them from exploding during frying.
In a small pan over medium heat, melt brown sugar with enough coconut oil to cover the bottom of the pan, stirring continuously until dissolved. Once dissolved, let it cool slightly.
When the bread slices are toasted but still pliable (they should be able to bend), remove from oven and carefully cut into thin strips.
Drain soaked dates and gently fold them with a bit of brown sugar mixture in the pan, ensuring they're evenly coated. Cook for 2-3 minutes or until golden and fragrant.
Transfer cooked date strips onto toasted bread slices. Serve immediately while hot.
Optional: Garnish with fresh mint leaves to add freshness and color.
